partial_progress.details: Research report completed with analysis of sorries and solutions

key_findings: 3 sorries in DirectMultiFamilyBFMCS are architecturally unprovable without S5 axiom
TM logic has T+4 axioms but lacks 5-axiom (Euclidean property)
Succ-chain bypass is the correct path for discrete completeness
Single-family FMCS Int avoids cross-family modal coherence requirement
Infrastructure for Succ-chain bypass is largely complete (Tasks 10-14)
recommendations: Document sorries as architecturally unprovable (not mathematical gaps)
Mark BFMCS approach as deprecated for discrete completeness
Complete SuccChainTaskFrame.lean to build TaskFrame Int directly
